title: Verdict
description: Adjudication output for the adjudicate node (debate-with-judge). approved=true breaks the producer-reviewer loop; otherwise the producer re-proposes against concerns. Matches the inlined S.adjudicate_schema table in workflow.js.

approved.description: True when the proposed design is sound enough to ship; the producer-reviewer loop breaks on true.

chosen.description: The option the judge endorses (an options[].name from the design). Stands even when approved=false as the current best.

rationale.description: The judge's reasoning for the chosen option, distilled from the debate transcript.

concerns.description: Unresolved issues the re-proposal must address. Empty when approved=true.

issue.description: What is wrong or under-justified in the design.
